title: What Is God Without Me feat. Adonis
lyrics: God without me, who am I? If I am not he, I'm demonized. My confidence got me paralyzed. I refuse to believe in a dead man till I die. What does God, God without me, who am I? If I am not he, I'm demonized. My confidence got me paralyzed. I refuse to believe in a dead man till I die. Now I know I'm fucked, now I know I'm booked. Now I know I'm sitting back, no love. Got everybody staring at me, now I gotta come back on that beat. Naturally, I hate that you just want beef. I hate that you can just want to see. Now they like, ooh, ooh, ooh, what he do? I'm like, poop, poop, poop, hop out on you. Don't care if you like that, I love it. I'm just here with the gunman above it. Taking over the body with my poses. Taking out everybody like a god with the ocean and emotion. Feeling that one spectacular emotion of hate. Let the gun go, debate. What you say? What does God, God without me, who am I? If I am not he, I'm demonized. My confidence got me paralyzed. I refuse to believe in a dead man till I die. What you say? What does God, God without me, who am I? If I am not he, I'm demonized. My confidence got me paralyzed. I refuse to believe in a dead man till I die. I could get you on a round, I was into leaving. Coating the unknown with nothing to believe in. Bruised up and beat down, then turn to bleeding. I see death is in the air, I can feel it in my breathing. Plus my odds are getting lower, gotta guess the reason. How am I awake? It feel like I am dreaming. A rose by any name is just a flower out of season. Depends how it rise from die or the cement. Apparently my future's only relevant in past tense. That's the case and clearly not in the present. It's common sense, maybe you should take a second and figure out what I've hidden in my message. Instead of being blinded by your own objections, protection is intended for subjection. Only God can judge me, nigga, what's with all the questions? Absolution itself is motive for depression. What is God, what is God without me, who am I? If I am not he, I'm demonized. My confidence got me paralyzed. I refuse to believe in a dead man till I die. Till I die, I'll be singing your praise. No inner level here, let's all get the raise you had to face. Why not? Fake Mr. Rogers said fuck you, bitch.

lyricsSegments.text: God without me, who am I? If I am not he, I'm demonized. My confidence got me paralyzed. I refuse to believe in a dead man till I die.
What does God, God without me, who am I? If I am not he, I'm demonized. My confidence got me paralyzed. I refuse to believe in a dead man till I die.
Now I know I'm fucked, now I know I'm booked. Now I know I'm sitting back, no love.
Got everybody staring at me, now I gotta come back on that beat. Naturally, I hate that you just want beef. I hate that you can just want to see.
Now they like, ooh, ooh, ooh, what he do? I'm like, poop, poop, poop, hop out on you. Don't care if you like that, I love it. I'm just here with the gunman above it.
Taking over the body with my poses. Taking out everybody like a god with the ocean and emotion. Feeling that one spectacular emotion of hate. Let the gun go, debate.
What you say? What does God, God without me, who am I? If I am not he, I'm demonized. My confidence got me paralyzed. I refuse to believe in a dead man till I die.
What you say? What does God, God without me, who am I? If I am not he, I'm demonized. My confidence got me paralyzed. I refuse to believe in a dead man till I die.

I could get you on a round, I was into leaving. Coating the unknown with nothing to believe in. Bruised up and beat down, then turn to bleeding. I see death is in the air, I can feel it in my breathing.
Plus my odds are getting lower, gotta guess the reason. How am I awake? It feel like I am dreaming. A rose by any name is just a flower out of season.
Depends how it rise from die or the cement. Apparently my future's only relevant in past tense. That's the case and clearly not in the present.
It's common sense, maybe you should take a second and figure out what I've hidden in my message. Instead of being blinded by your own objections, protection is intended for subjection.
Only God can judge me, nigga, what's with all the questions? Absolution itself is motive for depression.
What is God, what is God without me, who am I? If I am not he, I'm demonized. My confidence got me paralyzed. I refuse to believe in a dead man till I die.
Till I die, I'll be singing your praise. No inner level here, let's all get the raise you had to face.
Why not? Fake Mr. Rogers said fuck you, bitch.
